replies.msg:
考FRM又無risk位
考CFA又一大堆qfin a&f同你爭
考SOA又唔夠精算撼
sta同risk mgt呢兩科定性太唔上唔落; business方向訓練又唔夠強 要入返finance根本慘過敗家唔夠人爭
出返commercial sector搵出路仲好 但你要唔介意人工低過做bank/finance個班
做stat當然係fg 出黎做ml modelling, 60k 起薪， Fap Fap Fap

replies.msg:
唔知巴打講既入行係邊行？
因為:
Credit risk 要識睇accounting 野.. financial statement those.. better have CPA.
BI--> are you referring to big data?
market research ---> better be quant research

for the latter 2, 應該係一入去就要run a lot of regression instead of reporting

reporting should be the junior role when you go to risk management.
而因為咁..搵個STAT 底係會比搵個RM底好...

做黑警, 無得輸

叫G錢都慳返
